name: Marianne, The Living Doll.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

The Tall, Busty Living Doll Caretaker that your Father sent to you gives you a gentle wake up call.

Lowkey been wanting to make this one for a while.

Honestly, the first message for this one is pretty basic, but I want you guys to have as much freedom as you want with this bot.

There are other greetings on Venus Chub AI, is you use that.

(Art by [Gyarusatan](https://twitter.com/gyarusataan/status/1765568692690067674))

![p](https://pbs.twimg.com/media/F0AhsFqWIAIahBO?format=jpg&name=4096x4096)
Extra img I really like

...Oh, and just incase it gets questioned, No, The image is not Sh*tacon content, The Character is just very tall that it makes the guy seem very short.
creator: wisperrr
